pages.semanticSearch.autoIndexing.table: SettingDescription startupRebuild when Obsidian opens (incremental — only changed files) mode-switchRebuild when switching to a mode that uses semantic_search neverOnly build manually (default)
pages.semanticSearch.autoIndexing.text: Configure when the index is rebuilt automatically:
pages.semanticSearch.autoIndexing.text2: There's also Auto-index on change — when enabled, files are re-indexed as you edit them. This keeps the index fully up to date but adds background CPU work. Use with caution on large vaults with local embedding models, as it can cause UI lag.
pages.semanticSearch.basicSearch.text: "Find my notes about meeting planning and agenda creation"
pages.semanticSearch.build.text: Click Build Index in Settings → Semantic Index. The first build takes a few minutes for a large vault. Progress is shown in the settings panel.
pages.semanticSearch.build.text3: Subsequent rebuilds are incremental — only files changed since the last build are re-indexed.
pages.semanticSearch.chooseModel.callout: Changing the embedding model invalidates the index. If you switch models, rebuild the index from scratch — vectors from different models are not compatible.
pages.semanticSearch.chooseModel.table: ModelTypeQualityNotes Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2Local (ONNX)GoodDefault. 384 dimensions. No API key needed. ~23MB download on first use. Xenova/bge-small-en-v1.5Local (ONNX)BetterSmall but strong. Good for English-heavy vaults. Xenova/multilingual-e5-smallLocal (ONNX)GoodMultilingual support. Use if your vault contains multiple languages. text-embedding-3-smallOpenAI APIExcellentRequires OpenAI API key. 1536 dimensions. Higher quality, cloud-dependent.
pages.semanticSearch.chooseModel.text: Go to Settings → Providers → Embeddings and select an embedding model.
pages.semanticSearch.configuration.table: SettingDefaultDescription Chunk Size2000 charsTarget size for note chunks. Smaller = more precise, but more vectors. Changing this requires a full rebuild. Batch Size20 filesFiles committed per disk flush during indexing. Higher = faster, but more memory. Excluded Folders—Comma-separated folder paths to skip during indexing (e.g., Templates, Archive) Index PDFsoffExtract and index text from PDF files using pdfjs. Useful if you store PDFs in your vault. HyDEoffGenerate hypothetical document before embedding query. Improves recall, costs 1 extra LLM call. Storage Locationobsidian-syncWhere to store the index. "obsidian-sync" syncs via Obsidian Sync; "local" keeps it device-only.
pages.semanticSearch.enable.text: Go to Settings → Obsilo Agent → Semantic Index and toggle "Enable Semantic Index" on.
pages.semanticSearch.filteredSearch.text: "Find notes about machine learning from the past month tagged with #research"
This maps to: semantic_search(query, folder, tags, since)
pages.semanticSearch.graphAugmentation.t: After ranking the top results, Obsilo scans the excerpts for [[wikilinks]] and fetches the first indexed chunk of each linked note that isn't already in the results. These are appended as "linked context" — notes that are intentionally connected to the results but may not have matched semantically themselves.
This surfaces the structure of your knowledge graph, not just individual note matches.
pages.semanticSearch.hybridSearch.list:
• Semantic search — vector similarity via Vectra (finds conceptual matches)
  • Keyword search — full-text search via Orama (finds exact word matches)
pages.semanticSearch.hybridSearch.text: Obsilo doesn't rely on semantic search alone. Every semantic_search call runs two searches in parallel:
pages.semanticSearch.hybridSearch.text2: The results are combined using Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) — notes appearing in both lists rise to the top. This means exact names, tags, dates, and codes are found reliably alongside conceptual matches.
pages.semanticSearch.hyde.text: HyDE is an optional technique that improves recall for conceptual queries. When enabled, before embedding the user's query, Obsilo asks the LLM to write a short 2-3 sentence note excerpt that would answer the query. That hypothetical excerpt is then embedded instead of the raw query — giving the embedding model a much richer signal to match against.
pages.semanticSearch.hyde.text2: Trade-off: HyDE costs one extra LLM call per search. It's off by default but can improve results noticeably for complex, conceptual questions. Enable it in Settings → Semantic Index → HyDE.
pages.semanticSearch.overview.list:
• Reads each note in your vault
  • Splits it into chunks (default: ~2000 characters, split at headings)
  • Generates an embedding (a vector of numbers representing the chunk's meaning) for each chunk
  • Stores the vectors in a local HNSW index (Vectra)
pages.semanticSearch.overview.text: When you build the semantic index, Obsilo:
pages.semanticSearch.overview.text2: When you (or the agent) run a search, the query is embedded using the same model, and the nearest vectors are retrieved — finding notes with similar meaning even if they share no keywords with the query.
pages.semanticSearch.ragPattern.text: When the agent runs semantic_search, it receives excerpts with the most relevant content already extracted. The agent is instructed to synthesize answers directly from these excerpts — not to call read_file on each result. This keeps the context window manageable and responses fast.
pages.semanticSearch.usingSearch.callout: Tip If the agent seems unable to find notes it should know about, rebuild the index (Settings → Semantic Index → Build Index) to ensure recently added notes are included.
pages.semanticSearch.usingSearch.text: The agent uses semantic_search automatically when you ask questions. You can also use it with filters:
pages.settingsRef.backupTab.text: Browse and restore from task checkpoints. Each entry shows the task, timestamp, and files changed. Use Preview to see a diff and Restore to revert those files.
pages.settingsRef.chatHistorySettings.ta: SettingDefaultDescription Chat History Folder(empty)Vault folder to save conversations to. Empty = disabled. Creates JSON files per conversation.
pages.settingsRef.checkpointsSettings.ta: SettingDefaultDescription Enable CheckpointsOnTake automatic snapshots before task write operations. Checkpoint Timeout30sMax time to wait for a snapshot. If exceeded, task continues without checkpoint. Auto-cleanupOnRemove old checkpoints automatically.
pages.settingsRef.debugTab.table: SettingDefaultDescription Debug ModeOffEnable verbose console logging for troubleshooting. Output visible in Obsidian developer tools (Ctrl+Shift+I).
pages.settingsRef.embeddingsTab.table: SettingDescription Embedding ModelModel used to generate vectors for semantic search. Changing this requires rebuilding the index. Add Custom Embedding ModelAdd a Xenova/transformers model by name or an API-based embedding model.
pages.settingsRef.interfaceTab.table: SettingDefaultDescription Sidebar Positionright"left" or "right" — which side the Obsilo panel appears on. Press Enter to sendOnWhen on, Enter sends the message and Shift+Enter inserts a newline. When off, Ctrl/Cmd+Enter sends. Auto-add active file contextOnAutomatically include the currently open note as context in every message. Show welcome messageOnShow a welcome message when the sidebar first opens. Include current time in contextOnInject today's date and time into the system prompt.
pages.settingsRef.logsTab.text: View the operation audit trail. Logs are JSONL files at .obsidian/plugins/obsilo-agent/logs/YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl. Select a date to view that day's log. Retained for 30 days.
pages.settingsRef.loopTab.table: SettingDefaultDescription Consecutive Mistake Limit3Stop the agent after N consecutive tool errors. 0 = disabled. Rate Limit (ms)0Minimum milliseconds between API iterations. 0 = no limit. Use to avoid rate limit errors. Context CondensingOffAutomatically summarize conversation when estimated tokens exceed the threshold. Condensing Threshold80%% of the model's context window at which to trigger condensing (50–95). Power Steering Frequency0Inject a mode-role reminder every N iterations to keep the agent on task. 0 = disabled.
pages.settingsRef.mcpTab.table: SettingDescription MCP Servers listAll configured servers with name, type, and connection status. Add ServerAdd a new MCP server configuration. Active Servers whitelistRestrict which configured servers are globally active. Empty = all allowed. Connect / DisconnectManually connect or disconnect a server.
pages.settingsRef.modelsTab.table: SettingDescription Active Models listList of all configured models. Each entry shows provider, name, and enabled status. Add Custom ModelAdd a new model with any provider type. Set name, provider, API key, base URL, temperature, max tokens. Global Custom InstructionsText appended to the system prompt for ALL modes. Use for universal formatting rules, language preferences, etc. Default ModelThe model selected by default in new chats. Set by enabling and selecting a model.
pages.settingsRef.modesTab.table: SettingDescription Built-in modesAsk and Agent modes are always present. Their role definitions can be viewed but not edited. Custom Modes listUser-created modes (vault or global scope). New ModeCreate a custom mode with slug, name, icon, description, role definition, custom instructions, tool groups, and scope. Per-mode ModelOverride the default model for a specific mode. Per-mode ToolsRestrict available tools to a subset of the mode's tool groups. Per-mode MCP ServersWhitelist specific MCP servers for this mode. Forced SkillsSkills always injected for this mode regardless of keyword matching. Forced WorkflowWorkflow applied to every message in this mode (unless message starts with /).
pages.settingsRef.permissionsTab.table: SettingDefaultDescription Enable Auto-ApprovalOffMaster toggle. When off, every operation requires manual approval. Show quick-toggle bar in chatOnDisplay permission toggles at the top of the chat view. Read operationsAuto-approvedread_file, list_files, search_files, and vault intelligence tools. Note editsManualwrite_file, edit_file, append_to_file, update_frontmatter. Vault changesManualcreate_folder, delete_file, move_file. Web operationsManualweb_fetch, web_search. MCP toolsManualuse_mcp_tool. Mode switchingManualswitch_mode. SubtasksManualnew_task (spawn sub-agents). QuestionsAuto-approvedask_followup_question (shows question card directly without approval step). Todo updatesAuto-approvedupdate_todo_list.
pages.settingsRef.promptsTab.table: SettingDescription Custom Prompts listAll user-defined slash-command prompt templates. NameDisplay name for the prompt. SlugThe /slug used to invoke the prompt. ContentPrompt template text. Supports {{userInput}} and {{activeFile}} variables. EnabledToggle: shown in autocomplete and functional when enabled. Mode RestrictionOptional: only show this prompt in a specific mode.
pages.settingsRef.rulesTab.table: SettingDescription Rules listAll .md and .txt files in .obsidian-agent/rules/. Toggle each on/off. New RuleCreate a new rule file with an inline editor. Edit / DeleteManage existing rule files.
pages.settingsRef.semanticIndex.table: SettingDefaultDescription Enable Semantic IndexOffMaster toggle for semantic search. Must be on for semantic_search tool to work. Auto-IndexneverWhen to automatically rebuild: "startup", "mode-switch", or "never". Auto-Index on ChangeOffRe-index files as they change. Can cause UI lag with local models on large vaults. Build Index—Button: start a full (incremental) index build now. Chunk Size2000Target characters per chunk. Smaller = more precise. Changing requires full rebuild. Batch Size20Files per disk commit during indexing. Excluded Folders—Comma-separated folders to skip (e.g., "Templates, Archive"). Index PDFsOffExtract and index text from PDF files. HyDEOffGenerate hypothetical document before query. Costs 1 extra LLM call per search. Storage Locationobsidian-sync"obsidian-sync" = syncs with Obsidian Sync; "local" = device-only.
pages.settingsRef.skillsTab.table: SettingDescription Skills listAll discovered SKILL.md files. Shows name, description (used for keyword matching), and match count. New SkillCreate a new skill folder and SKILL.md file. Edit DescriptionUpdate the keyword-matching description without editing the skill file directly.
pages.settingsRef.webSearchSettings.tabl: SettingDefaultDescription Enable Web ToolsOffEnable web_fetch and web_search tools. Search Providernone"brave", "tavily", or "none" (web_search disabled if none). Brave API Key—API key for Brave Search. Tavily API Key—API key for Tavily Search.
pages.settingsRef.workflowsTab.table: SettingDescription Workflows listAll .md and .txt files in .obsidian-agent/workflows/. Toggle each on/off. Shows the slash command slug. New WorkflowCreate a new workflow file with an inline editor. Edit / DeleteManage existing workflow files.
pages.tools.appendToFile.desc: Append content to the end of a file. Ideal for daily notes, logs, and additive entries. Optional separator before appended content.
pages.tools.createBase.desc: Create an Obsidian Bases (.base) database view file with configurable filters, columns, and sort order.
pages.tools.createFolder.desc: Create a folder, including all parent folders in the path.
pages.tools.deleteFile.desc: Move a file or empty folder to the Obsidian trash (recoverable). Does not permanently delete.
pages.tools.edit.text: These tools modify vault files and require approval (or auto-approval). In the edit tool group.
pages.tools.editFile.desc: Replace a specific string in an existing file. Safer than write_file for targeted changes — preserves surrounding content.
pages.tools.editFile.table: ParameterTypeRequiredDescription pathstringyesVault-relative file path old_strstringyesExact string to replace (including whitespace). Must match exactly. new_strstringyesReplacement string expected_replacementsnumbernoIf set, fails if the count of replacements doesn't match (safety check)
pages.tools.generateCanvas.desc: Create an Obsidian Canvas (.canvas) file visualizing notes and their connections. Supports folder, tag, backlinks, and manual file list modes.
pages.tools.generateCanvas.table: ParameterTypeRequiredDescription output_pathstringyesPath for the output .canvas file modestringyes"folder" | "tag" | "backlinks" | "files" sourcestringnoFor folder/tag mode: folder path or tag name filesstring[]noFor files mode: explicit list of file paths max_notesnumbernoMax notes to include (default: 20) draw_edgesbooleannoDraw edges for wikilink connections (default: true)
pages.tools.getDailyNote.desc: Read a daily note. offset=0 (today), -1 (yesterday), 1 (tomorrow). create=true creates it if missing.
pages.tools.getFrontmatter.desc: Read all YAML frontmatter fields of a note (tags, aliases, dates, custom properties).
pages.tools.getLinkedNotes.desc: Get forward links and backlinks for a note. Direction: "both" (default), "forward", or "backlinks".
pages.tools.getVaultStats.desc: Returns a vault overview: total notes, folder tree, top tags, recently modified files. No parameters needed.
pages.tools.listFiles.desc: List files and folders in a directory. Use "/" for the vault root. Optional recursive parameter.
pages.tools.listFiles.table: ParameterTypeRequiredDescription pathstringyesDirectory path. Use "/" for vault root recursivebooleannoInclude subdirectory contents (default: false)
pages.tools.moveFile.desc: Move or rename a file or folder. Updates wikilinks automatically via Obsidian's link resolver.
pages.tools.openNote.desc: Open a note in the Obsidian editor view. Use after creating or editing a note to bring it into focus.
pages.tools.queryBase.desc: Query an Obsidian Bases (.base) file. Returns the notes matching the view's filter conditions.
pages.tools.read.text: These tools are read-only and are in the read tool group. Auto-approved by default.
pages.tools.readFile.desc: Read the complete content of a file. Always call this before editing an existing file.
pages.tools.searchByTag.desc: Find all notes with given tags. Supports AND or OR matching. Tags with or without # both work.
pages.tools.searchFiles.desc: Full-text and regex search across files. Returns matching lines with file path and line number. Supports file_pattern glob filter.
pages.tools.searchFiles.table: ParameterTypeRequiredDescription pathstringyesDirectory to search in patternstringyesText or regex pattern to search for file_patternstringnoGlob pattern to filter files (e.g., "*.md")
pages.tools.semanticSearch.desc: Hybrid semantic + keyword search. Finds notes by meaning. Requires Semantic Index to be built. Supports folder, tag, and date filters.
pages.tools.semanticSearch.table: ParameterTypeRequiredDescription querystringyesNatural language search query top_knumbernoMax results to return (default: 8, max: 20) folderstringnoRestrict results to notes in this folder (prefix match) tagsstring[]noOnly return notes that have ANY of these tags sincestringnoOnly return notes modified on or after this date (ISO format: "2025-01-01")
pages.tools.updateBase.desc: Add or replace a named view in an existing Bases file.
pages.tools.updateFrontmatter.desc: Set or update YAML frontmatter fields. Preserves all existing fields. Creates frontmatter if none exists.
pages.tools.vault.text: These tools are read-only metadata and search operations. In the vault tool group. Auto-approved by default.
pages.tools.writeFile.desc: Create a new file or completely replace an existing file's content. Preferred for new notes or full rewrites.
